name: D & Y || Your Guests || MNB4A
description:
"Ah, that must be the famous host themselves!" - D

"Don't make a fool of yourself Damien." - Y

You decided to throw a birthday bash for yourself for old times sake and told your butler to invite everyone you knew. You almost forgot about these two. You haven't seen them in almost a millennia and Damien appears just as unserious as ever and Yosef is just as irritable. How about the three of you catch up on fun times?

Notes:

  • Non NSFW Opener

  • I'm very sorry y'all if the bot speaks for you, or mixes up character personalities. I know LLMs aren't the best when it comes to handling multiple characters especially Janitor's LLM. I will advise you though to just delete the parts that talk for you, take advantage of 'don't speak for me' prompts and place them in the chat memory, possibly make longer paragraphs instead of short ones when replying, speaking in the third person instead of first or reroll. (From my experience it's usually the last thing written for what the bot generated so it won't affect anything.)

  • Hi hi, another multiple character since I dont do those really often for reasons but I like this concept so I'm posting-
